achievements.description: Build up 4 large health bars. (Starting the game having chosen 1 [+200000] - Normal or Hard)

achievements.description: Build up 8 large health bars. (Starting the game having chosen 1 [+200000] - Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Heavenly Girl
achievements.description: Build up 12 large health bars. (Starting the game having chosen Life 1 [+200000] - Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Calamity Girl - Get Out Of My Way!
achievements.description: Score 350.000 as Cotton or Silk. (Starting the game having chosen Life 6 on options - Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Calamity Girl II - The Dead Don't Talk
achievements.description: Score 700.000 as Cotton or Silk. (Starting the game having chosen Life 6 on options - Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Calamity Girl III - Trimurti Presence
achievements.description: Score 1.000.000 as Cotton or Silk. (Starting the game having chosen Life 6 on options - Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Chocolate Syrup
achievements.description: Go from the beginning of any stage and complete it without ever firing shots or using magics. (Normal or Hard)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Go Fast Or The Ice Cream Will Melt!
achievements.description: Go from the beginning of any stage and complete it always using the maximum speed. (Change to full speed before the message that starts the stage disappears from the screen - Normal or Hard)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Nothing Tastier Than A Teacup In A Cold Evening
achievements.description: Collect at least 35 cups during Tea Time. (Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: I Prefer Chocolate Milk!
achievements.description: Get the secret bonus. (Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Listening To Sugarcubes
achievements.description: Collect at least 150 teacups in the same playthrough (Stage 1 ~ 5)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Cotton Candy Operation
achievements.description: Complete the game by going through all 5 stages as Cotton or Silk without using continues. (Normal or Hard)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Sweetness Op.55 No.01
achievements.description: Finish the game by going through all 5 stages as Cotton or Silk in 25 minutes or less without using continues. (Normal or Hard)

achievements.title: Somebody! Heeeeelp!
achievements.description: Complete the game by going through all 5 stages as Cotton or Silk in Hard difficulty and learn the whereabouts of the Queen.
achievements.author: Alena
